name: companyhelm-runner
description: Run coding agents in fully isolated Docker sandboxes, locally.

scripts.generate:codex-app-server: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -e CODEX_HOME=/workspace/node_modules/.cache/codex -v "$PWD:/workspace" -w /workspace companyhelm/runner:latest bash -lc 'mkdir -p /workspace/node_modules/.cache/codex; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; codex app-server generate-ts --out src/generated/codex-app-server'
